languages.text: {n}Статный аристократ одет в мундир цветов династии фон Валанциус. Аугменты покрывают его лицо, единственная уцелевшая часть которого — натянутый лоскут серой воспаленной кожи и водянисто-голубой глаз. Вольный Торговец с интересом наблюдает, как вы разглядываете его.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Статный аристократ одет в мундир цветов династии фон Валанциус. Аугменты покрывают его лицо, единственная уцелевшая часть которого — натянутый лоскут серой воспаленной кожи и водянисто-голубой глаз. Вольный Торговец с интересом наблюдает, как вы разглядываете его.{/n}

languages.text: {n}The stately nobleman is wearing a uniform in von Valancius colours. Augments cover his face, the only surviving part of which is a taut scrap of grey, inflamed skin and a bright blue eye. The Rogue Trader watches you with interest as you take in his appearance.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Статный аристократ одет в мундир цветов династии фон Валанциус. Аугменты покрывают его лицо, единственная уцелевшая часть которого — натянутый лоскут серой воспаленной кожи и водянисто-голубой глаз. Вольный Торговец с интересом наблюдает, как вы разглядываете его.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}The stately nobleman is wearing a uniform in von Valancius colours. Augments cover his face, the only surviving part of which is a taut scrap of grey, inflamed skin and a bright blue eye. The Rogue Trader watches you with interest as you take in his appearance.{/n}

{n}The stately nobleman is wearing a uniform in von Valancius colours. Augments cover his face, the only surviving part of which is a taut scrap of grey, inflamed skin and a bright blue eye. The Rogue Trader watches you with interest as you take in his appearance.{/n}

{n}The stately nobleman is wearing a uniform in von Valancius colours. Augments cover his face, the only surviving part of which is a taut scrap of grey, inflamed skin and a bright blue eye. The Rogue Trader watches you with interest as you take in his appearance.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Der stattliche Edelmann trägt eine Uniform in den Farben derer von Valancius. Von seinem mit Augmentationen bedeckten Gesicht ist nur noch eine graue Hautpartie und ein strahlend blaues Auge übrig. Der Freihändler beobachtet dich interessiert, während du ihn musterst.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The stately nobleman is wearing a uniform in von Valancius colours. Augments cover his face, the only surviving part of which is a taut scrap of grey, inflamed skin and a bright blue eye. The Rogue Trader watches you with interest as you take in his appearance.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Der stattliche Edelmann trägt eine Uniform in den Farben derer von Valancius. Von seinem mit Augmentationen bedeckten Gesicht ist nur noch eine graue Hautpartie und ein strahlend blaues Auge übrig. Der Freihändler beobachtet dich interessiert, während du ihn musterst.{/n}

languages.text: {n}这位气度不凡的贵族身穿冯·瓦兰修斯王朝配色的制服。他的脸上遍布植入物，唯一残存的原生部分是一小块紧绷、发炎的灰皮肤，以及一只明亮的蓝眼睛。当你打量他的外貌时，这位行商浪人也饶有兴致地看着你。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The stately nobleman is wearing a uniform in von Valancius colours. Augments cover his face, the only surviving part of which is a taut scrap of grey, inflamed skin and a bright blue eye. The Rogue Trader watches you with interest as you take in his appearance.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}这位气度不凡的贵族身穿冯·瓦兰修斯王朝配色的制服。他的脸上遍布植入物，唯一残存的原生部分是一小块紧绷、发炎的灰皮肤，以及一只明亮的蓝眼睛。当你打量他的外貌时，这位行商浪人也饶有兴致地看着你。{/n}

languages.text: {n}L'aristocrate à la présence imposante porte un uniforme aux couleurs des von Valancius. Des augmentations recouvrent son visage, ne laissant apercevoir qu'un carré de peau grise distendue et irritée, ainsi qu'un unique œil bleu vif. Le libre-marchand vous observe avec intérêt tandis que vous l'examinez.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The stately nobleman is wearing a uniform in von Valancius colours. Augments cover his face, the only surviving part of which is a taut scrap of grey, inflamed skin and a bright blue eye. The Rogue Trader watches you with interest as you take in his appearance.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}L'aristocrate à la présence imposante porte un uniforme aux couleurs des von Valancius. Des augmentations recouvrent son visage, ne laissant apercevoir qu'un carré de peau grise distendue et irritée, ainsi qu'un unique œil bleu vif. Le libre-marchand vous observe avec intérêt tandis que vous l'examinez.{/n}

languages.text: {n}El noble de porte regio viste un uniforme con la librea de los von Valancius. Tiene el rostro cubierto de aumentos; la única parte original que aún conserva es un trozo de piel grisácea inflamada y estirada, así como un brillante ojo azul. El Comerciante Independiente te observa con interés mientras examinas su aspecto.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The stately nobleman is wearing a uniform in von Valancius colours. Augments cover his face, the only surviving part of which is a taut scrap of grey, inflamed skin and a bright blue eye. The Rogue Trader watches you with interest as you take in his appearance.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}El noble de porte regio viste un uniforme con la librea de los von Valancius. Tiene el rostro cubierto de aumentos; la única parte original que aún conserva es un trozo de piel grisácea inflamada y estirada, así como un brillante ojo azul. El Comerciante Independiente te observa con interés mientras examinas su aspecto.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Görkemli soylu, von Valancius renklerinde bir üniforma giyiyor. Yüzü tamamen ogmentlerle kaplı, sağlam kalan tek kısımsa gergin bir gri, iltihaplı deri parçası ve parlak mavi bir göz. Hür Tacir, sen onun görünümünü incelerken seni ilgiyle izliyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The stately nobleman is wearing a uniform in von Valancius colours. Augments cover his face, the only surviving part of which is a taut scrap of grey, inflamed skin and a bright blue eye. The Rogue Trader watches you with interest as you take in his appearance.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Görkemli soylu, von Valancius renklerinde bir üniforma giyiyor. Yüzü tamamen ogmentlerle kaplı, sağlam kalan tek kısımsa gergin bir gri, iltihaplı deri parçası ve parlak mavi bir göz. Hür Tacir, sen onun görünümünü incelerken seni ilgiyle izliyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}その威厳ある貴族はフォン・ヴァランシウス家の軍服を着ている。顔は増幅器で覆われており、生き残った部分は、引き締まった灰色の皮膚と、炎症を起こした部分、そして明るい青い眼だけである。そのならず者商人は、あなたの視線を興味深く見つめている。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The stately nobleman is wearing a uniform in von Valancius colours. Augments cover his face, the only surviving part of which is a taut scrap of grey, inflamed skin and a bright blue eye. The Rogue Trader watches you with interest as you take in his appearance.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}その威厳ある貴族はフォン・ヴァランシウス家の軍服を着ている。顔は増幅器で覆われており、生き残った部分は、引き締まった灰色の皮膚と、炎症を起こした部分、そして明るい青い眼だけである。そのならず者商人は、あなたの視線を興味深く見つめている。{/n}
